title: zehneria scaberrima
intro: Zehneria scaberrima, also known as the rough Indian cucumber or bitter cucumber, is a plant species in the family Cucurbitaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, offering several health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Zehneria scaberrima can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make oils and tinctures for topical application.
